green.label: All Clear
green.note: No active advisories detected for your area.
reasons: No severe weather alerts from EMA.
No active road closures reported near your location.
911 call volume is within normal range.

yellow.label: Advisory Nearby
yellow.note: Weather advisory active — stay alert and check EMA updates.
reasons: Severe thunderstorm watch issued for Montgomery County.
One road closure reported on Dexter Avenue due to utility work.
Emergency Management recommends monitoring weather conditions.

red.label: Active Alert
red.note: Severe weather warning active. Seek shelter and avoid unnecessary travel.
reasons: Tornado warning issued for Montgomery County by NWS.
Multiple road closures reported across downtown area.
Emergency Management advises sheltering in place.
